Ahri.text: Should I make your pulse rise? Or stop?
Come try your luck, if you think you're in my league.
They won't even know what hit 'em.

Yasuo.text: A sword's poor company for a long road.
The story is not yet finished.
Death is like the wind, always by my side.

Jinx.text: Rules are made to be broken... like buildings! Or people!
I'm crazy! Got a doctor's note.
You think I'm crazy? You should see my sister.
Wait, I'm thinking! Urgh... how do people do this?

Lux.text: Light mage. Definitely not a spy.
In the name of Demacia, I will punish you!
Double rainbow? What does it mean?

Thresh.text: What delightful agony we shall inflict.
I am the thing under the bed.

Zed.text: The unseen blade is the deadliest.
Tradition is the corpse of wisdom.

LeeSin.text: Blindness is no impairment against a smelly enemy.

Faker_Ryze.text: Take this scroll and stick it... somewhere safe.
A Rune Mage's work is never done.

Darius.text: Don't turn your back, or expose your neck.

Garen.text: My heart and sword, always for Demacia.
Come forth, you will find honor in death.

Katarina.text: If you run, you won't see me stab you.
Keep friends close and enemies guessing.

Vayne.text: Let us hunt those who have fallen to darkness.

Ezreal.text: Time for a true display of skill!

MissFortune.text: Watch your mouth kid, or you'll find yourself respawning at home.

Jhin.text: In carnage, I bloom... like a flower in the dawn.
Every element of this performance must be perfect.

Viego.text: I will bring her back. I will bring them all back.
The world was set ablaze by my love. I'd do it again.
Everything I do, I do for love.

Yone.text: I walk two paths, in two worlds.
Every demon I slay brings me closer to the truth.
I died once. I will not fear death again.

Akali.text: I am the point of the blade!
A lot of things can change in one night.

Kaisa.text: I'm not afraid. I was forged in the fires beneath the world.
Stay behind me. I'll handle this.
The Void took my family. I will take everything from it.
Each bullet is a piece of my will.

Sett.text: This is where the fun begins.
If it's a fight they want, I'm the boss to beat.
Mama always said I was hard-headed.
I didn't come this far to lose.
